attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
BATCH_ID 
,ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID 
,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME 
,ACCOUNT_CLASS 
,ACCOUNT_CODE 
,ACCTD_AMOUNT 
,ADJUSTMENT_ID 
,ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER 
,ADJUSTMENT_TYPE 
,AMOUNT 
,BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID 
,BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID 
,CODE_COMBINATION_ID 
,COGS_PERCENT 
,COMMENTS 
,CONTEXT 
,CREATED_BY 
,CREATION_DATE 
,CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
,CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
,CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID 
,DEFAULT_SC_FLAG 
,EXTENDED_AMOUNT 
,EXTRACT_TYPE 
,FISCAL_ID 
,FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG 
,FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE 
,GES_UPDATE_DATE 
,GLOBAL_NAME 
,GL_DATE 
,GL_POSTED_DATE 
,GROUPING_ID 
,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID 
,INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE 
,INVOICE_PERCENT 
,INVOICING_RULE_ID 
,LAST_UPDATED_BY 
,LAST_UPDATE_DATE 
,LATEST_RECORD_FLAG 
,SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT 
,LINE_TYPE 
,LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID 
,ORDER_HEADER_ID 
,ORDER_LINE_ID 
,ORDER_NUMBER 
,ORG_ID 
,LINE_PERCENT 
,PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
,PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
,QUOTA_FLAG 
,REASON_CODE 
,REBATE_AMOUNT 
,REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID 
,REQUEST_ID 
,RULE_START_DATE 
,SALESREP_ID 
,SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID 
,SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID 
,SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID 
,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID 
,SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD 
,SPLIT_PERCENT 
,TERRITORY_ID 
,TRANSACTION_DATE 
,TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE 
,TRANSACTION_QUANTITY 
,TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID 
,TRX_DATE 
,TRX_NAME 
,TRX_NUMBER 
,TRX_TYPE 
,UNIT_SELLING_PRICE 
,UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE 
,CREATE_DATETIME 
,ACTION_CODE
,DV_TRANSACTION_KEY
,DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD
,BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
,SALES_REP_NUMBER
,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT /* added as part of sales credit CR*/
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_TRX_RT_OOD EOXRTR 
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS 
( 
SELECT TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID ,GLOBAL_NAME 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_TRX_RV_OOD WOXRTRT 
WHERE 
WOXRTRT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID =EOXRTR .TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID 
and WOXRTRT.GLOBAL_NAME =EOXRTR .GLOBAL_NAME 
)

SELECT 
 NCR.BATCH_ID,
 NCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
 NCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
 NCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS,
 NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,
 NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT,
 NCR.ADJUSTMENT_ID,
 NCR.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
 NCR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
 NCR.AMOUNT,
 NCR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
 NCR.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
 NCR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
 NCR.COGS_PERCENT,
 NCR.COMMENTS,
 NCR.CONTEXT,
 NCR.CREATED_BY,
 NCR.CREATION_DATE,
 NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
 NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
 NCR.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
 NCR.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
 NCR.EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
 NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE,
 NCR.FISCAL_ID,
 NCR.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
 NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
 NCR.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
 NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
 NCR.GL_DATE,
 NCR.GL_POSTED_DATE,
 NCR.GROUPING_ID,
 NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
 NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
 NCR.INVOICE_PERCENT,
 NCR.INVOICING_RULE_ID,
 NCR.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
 NCR.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 NCR.LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
 NCR.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
 NCR.LINE_TYPE,
 NCR.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
 NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID,
 CASE WHEN NCR.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG ='Y' THEN COALESCE(SMSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,-9999) 
	ELSE NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID END ORDER_LINE_ID,
 NCR.ORDER_NUMBER,
 NCR.ORG_ID,
 NCR.LINE_PERCENT,
 NCR.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
 NCR.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
 NCR.QUOTA_FLAG,
 NCR.REASON_CODE,
 NCR.REBATE_AMOUNT,
 NCR.REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
 NCR.REQUEST_ID,
 NCR.RULE_START_DATE,
 NCR.SALESREP_ID,
 NCR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,
 NCR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
 NCR.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
 NCR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
 NCR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
 NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,
 NCR.TERRITORY_ID,
 NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE,
 NCR.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,
 NCR.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
 NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
 NCR.TRX_DATE,
 NCR.TRX_NAME,
 NCR.TRX_NUMBER,
 NCR.TRX_TYPE,
 NCR.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
 NCR.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
 NCR.CREATE_DATETIME,
 NCR.ACTION_CODE,
 NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
 NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
 NCR.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
 NCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 NCR.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT /* added as part of sales credit CR*/
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_TRX_RV_OOD NCR
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
 /* START : Q2FY15 LSS */	
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORDER_LINES_ALL ELOLA
	ON CAST(CAST(NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(50)) = ELOLA.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF	
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN
	ON (SMSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT  =  NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID                 
		AND SMSOLN.SS_CODE = ELOLA.SS_CODE)
 /* END : Q2FY15 LSS */
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
 ON(SMSOLN.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          =NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY         )
WHERE  NSOL.DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG='Y'

SELECT 
	NCR.BATCH_ID,
	NCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
	NCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
	NCR.ACCOUNT_CLASS,
	NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,
	NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT,
	NCR.ADJUSTMENT_ID,
	NCR.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
	NCR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
	NCR.AMOUNT,
	NCR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
	NCR.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
	NCR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
	NCR.COGS_PERCENT,
	NCR.COMMENTS,
	NCR.CONTEXT,
	NCR.CREATED_BY,
	NCR.CREATION_DATE,
	NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
	NCR.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
	NCR.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
	NCR.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
	NCR.EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
	NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE,
	NCR.FISCAL_ID,
	NCR.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
	NCR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
	NCR.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
	NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
	NCR.GL_DATE,
	NCR.GL_POSTED_DATE,
	NCR.GROUPING_ID,
	NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
	NCR.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
	NCR.INVOICE_PERCENT,
	NCR.INVOICING_RULE_ID,
	NCR.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
	NCR.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
	NCR.LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
	NCR.LINE_SEQ_ID,
	NCR.LINE_TYPE,
	NCR.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
	NCR.ORDER_HEADER_ID,
	NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID,
	NCR.ORDER_NUMBER,
	NCR.ORG_ID,
	NCR.LINE_PERCENT,
	NCR.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
	NCR.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
	NCR.QUOTA_FLAG,
	NCR.REASON_CODE,
	NCR.REBATE_AMOUNT,
	NCR.REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
	NCR.REQUEST_ID,
	NCR.RULE_START_DATE,
	NCR.SALESREP_ID,
	NCR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,
	NCR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
	NCR.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
	NCR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
	NCR.SOURCE_TYPE,
	NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,
	NCR.TERRITORY_ID,
	NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE,
	NCR.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,
	NCR.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
	NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
	NCR.TRX_DATE,
	NCR.TRX_NAME,
	NCR.TRX_NUMBER,
	NCR.TRX_TYPE,
	NCR.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
	NCR.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
	NCR.CREATE_DATETIME,
	NCR.ACTION_CODE,
	NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY ,
	NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
	NCR.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
    NCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
    NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
	NCR.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT /* added as part of sales credit CR*/
FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_OOD NCR
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
/* LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SMSOLN
	ON (SMSOLN.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT  =  NCR.ORDER_LINE_ID                 
	AND SMSOLN.SS_CODE = 'BV') */  /* Q2FY15 LSS */
WHERE NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE IN ('INV','REV')
